description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: get_supported_boards and build. The get_supported_boards job checks out the repository, runs a script to get a list of supported boards, and uploads the list as an artifact. The build job depends on get_supported_boards, checks out the repository, downloads the list of supported boards, and triggers a build for each board by running a separate workflow.
